correctness.limitation: Kernel produces correct-magnitude output but precision is off due to GetValue() synchronization issue between vector ops and scalar reads. Needs proper vector-only implementation.

benchmark.note: Kernel ~78 us for B=1, latency stable across all batches

correctness.limitation: PyPTO kernel executes but tile shape tuning needed. set_vec_tile_shapes(1024, 2048) not optimal for reduce operations across dim=32. RowSumSingle tile shape error.

next_steps: Fix Ascend C kernel: use vector-only approach without GetValue/SetValue by broadcasting mean/var via Duplicate + BinaryRepeatParams
Fix PyPTO kernel: tune tile shapes for dim=32 reduce operations
Run full msprof benchmarks after correctness gates pass
Compare FP32 reference vs FP16 accumulation paths
